field_values.action_summary: Carter is rescued by the Ptor family at their farm. They provide him with food and perform a ritualistic grooming—applying red oil to his skin and cutting his hair—to help him pass as a Red Martian on his way to Zodanga.
field_values.camera_intent: Warm domestic medium shots; Close-ups of grooming (oil application, hair cutting); Food and sustenance close-ups
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: john_carter skin must be coated in red oil
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH020_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the transition of john_carter from a vulnerable wanderer to a disguised traveler. The scene focuses on the ritualistic grooming process within the ptor_farmstead to ensure he can pass as a Red Martian for his journey to Zodanga.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- ptor_family

## Required Environments
- ptor_farmstead (homes on metal shafts)

## Continuity Constraints
- john_carter skin must be coated in red oil
- john_carter hairstyle must be altered/cut

## Beat List
- BT001: Sustenance and recovery
- BT002: Ritualistic grooming
- BT003: Final preparation
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
